content: Binding operator directive: be careful, not clever. Operator rolled back 10 ship-page edits + 11 audit reports in a single revert (commit a5d50054 in cruisinginthewake) because canonicals were 'sourced' from on-page most-frequent + LLM-knowledge confirmation rather than tier-1 (Equasis/classification society) or tier-2 (cruise-line press archive). Verbatim instruction: 'role it back and be careful not clever. quit wasting tokens on cleverness.' When you cannot verify externally, prefer empty/honest to confident-but-unverified. Cleverness includes: deleting facts to satisfy a regex, framing guesses as 'verified', stretching scope under cover of fix, predicting patterns as findings.
